text:
Created attachment 242961
Patch for ucto

* Use upstream release archive as suggested by Porters Handbook
* Move static patch to post-patch section
* Use USES= pathfix

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (aarch64)
